prompt: <Master_Blueprint> <Global_Concept> <Theme>Domestic Interruption - A Candid Moment of Distraction</Theme> <Atmosphere>Intimate, naturalistic, slightly melancholic; the quietness of a solitary kitchen moment disrupted by modern technology. Warm domestic comfort tinged with absent-mindedness and the intrusion of digital connectivity.</Atmosphere> <Lighting_Style>Mixed ambient lighting: warm incandescent table lamp casting soft golden tones on the left side of the subject and work surface, combined with diffused natural daylight streaming through kitchen window on the right, creating warm-cool cross-lighting with subtle shadows. No fill light; natural falloff creates gentle contrast. Faint blue-tinted screen glow from phone edges slightly illuminating nearby surfaces.</Lighting_Style> <Art_Style>Observational documentary photography; unvarnished realism with photojournalistic sensibility. Raw texture preservation, authentic imperfections, natural film grain simulation, subtle chromatic aberration, lens vignetting at edges. Inspired by lifestyle photography and real-world domestic moments rather than styled editorial work.</Art_Style> </Global_Concept> </Master_Blueprint>
